title: Unlimited Enchantments
description: Make all enchantments go up to level 100 !!!
body:
Looking for more powerfull enchantments ?

With this pack all enchantments can go up to level 100 !!!


Also check out "KS Enchantments" for more than 30 new custom enchantments ! https://modrinth.com/datapack/ks-enchantments

![unlimited enchants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a4fc5d38f32306cffaabf0cd79a007431c314ff5.png)


By design, this pack is absolutely unbalanced, everything is absolutely broken and will probably lead to chaos, so enjoy it !

If you use the datapack version, a resourcepack is provided inside the zipped datapack to translate the enchantment level to 100 If you are using the mod version then everything is good to go !
